description: While Daisy and Deke work on their tech at the crime scene, the disguised Chronicom hunters return to eliminate S.H.I.E.L.D. agents. Daisy recognizes the threat just in time and the two are forced into a fight. Working together, they dispatch the robotic threats, managing to take one of the Chronicoms captive for interrogation. They decide to return to Zephyr One to regroup and extract information from their enemy.

transcript.line: Deke. Can that go any faster?
Well, it's sampling his DNA and simulating missing bone structures. But how fast would you like it to go?
It is unfortunate the bodies were discovered so quickly. We must maintain our cover for tonight.
Silent precision is absolutely necessary... Quake. She's here.
Obviously not. S.H.I.E.L.D. has managed to follow us here.
I will play the part of police captain. You isolate and eliminate all members of S.H.I.E.L.D. And, Abel... remember to smile.
Inspector Johnson, RCMP. Your scene is a part of a case I'm working on.
There's a suspicious truck out back. Care to inspect it with me?
If you wish to live, do not come in. There may be screaming.
Hey, nothing to... see here but era-appropriate police work. Oh, it's you. It's a trusted officer of the law...
Can you get that truck running?
Basic combustion engine. I can do that.
